description: For compound requests, the model adds the field first, then re-fetches the content model, then uses find-field to get the capiKey for the rule target — and applies the rule via patch
userMessage: Add a country dropdown to /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1 and show address only when country is set to 'US'

rubric.description: The model calls patch-aem-page-content to add the country dropdown field before attempting any rule creation
The model calls get-aem-page-content at least once after the field-add patch — to obtain a content model it can use as the basis for rule creation
The model makes a second patch-aem-page-content call applying an fd:visible or fd:rules rule that controls the address field's visibility based on the country value
